summary: Activities Management integration with Trip Builder (Customize Your Trip) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Activities modal opens from 'Add Activity in [City]' button, activities are correctly filtered by city (only Dubai activities shown for Dubai trip), activity selection toggles correctly, multiple activities can be added per day, selected activities appear in day card with images/badges/timing/price, activities shown in Trip Summary sidebar with individual prices, total pricing includes activities correctly.

activities_modal_opens.details: Clicking '+ Add Activity in Dubai' button opens modal with 'Activities in Dubai' header

activities_filtered_by_city.details: Only Dubai activities shown (3 activities: Desert Safari, Burj Khalifa, Dubai City Tour) - API uses regex city filter

test_flow: Initial: 0 activities selected for this day
Select 1st: 1 activity selected for this day
Select 2nd: 2 activities selected for this day
Deselect 1st: 1 activity selected for this day
Re-select 1st + select 3rd: 3 activities selected for this day

elements_shown: Inclusions badges (e.g., 'Hotel pickup and drop-off', '4x4 Land Cruiser')

selected_activities_in_day_card.details: Activities appear in day card (purple background) with image, name, category/transfer badges, timing info, and price

selected_activities_in_trip_summary.details: Trip Summary sidebar shows 'Activities' section with 'Day 1 - Dubai' and all selected activities with individual prices

multiple_activities_per_day.details: Successfully added 3 activities to single day

test_flow_used: 3. Fill destination: Dubai, Leaving From: DXB, Star rating: 4
4. Click 'Create Proposal' -> Trip Builder page loads
5. Scroll down to Day 1 -> Click '+ Add Activity in Dubai'
6. Activities modal opens with 3 Dubai activities
7. Test selection toggle: select, deselect, re-select
9. Click 'Done' -> Activities appear in day card
10. Verify Trip Summary shows activities with prices
critical_code_review_comments: ActivitiesModal component properly filters activities by city from API
Activity selection state uses key format 'city_day' for multi-day support
handleSelectActivity properly toggles selection (adds if not exists, removes if exists)
Activity pricing correctly added to calculatePricing function
Day card displays activities with all relevant info (image, badges, timing, price)
Trip Summary sidebar shows activities grouped by day with individual prices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activities Management integration with Trip Builder fully tested. Key flow: Login -> Book FIT Package -> Fill form with Dubai -> Create Proposal -> Trip Builder page -> Click 'Add Activity in Dubai' -> Activities modal shows 3 Dubai activities -> Select activities -> Done -> Activities appear in day card and Trip Summary with pricing. API endpoint: GET /api/activities?city=Dubai. Activity selection toggles correctly, multiple activities per day work, pricing calculation correct.
